title: Mixed Moroccan Beef Khlea
description: Grassy, chewy Moroccan dish featuring mixed beef cuts, pickle, and a low-calorie twist.

ingredients.name: Pickle Brine
ingredients.notes: or 1/2 cup of salt, 1/4 cup of black peppercorns, 2 cloves of garlic, 1 cup of water

instructions: Heat a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add 1 tablespoon of olive oil and brown the beef on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Transfer the browned beef to a plate and set aside.
In the same pot, add the pickle brine mixture and bring to a boil, scraping up any browned bits from the bottom of the pot.
Note: this recipe is for refrigerator pickling/preserving only — store in the refrigerator and consume within 1 week. Do not water-bath can without an acid (vinegar or lemon juice).
